name: hewg_contract
description: Return the structured contract for one annotated symbol. Accepts `module/path::name`, `path/to/file.ts:name`, or a bare `name`. Returns JSON with signature, effects, caps, pre, post, cost, errors, and source location. Prefer this to read_file when you only need a function's interface.

symbol.description: The symbol to look up. Forms: `module/path::name`, `path/to/file.ts:name`, or bare `name`.
